description:
Sketch and take handwritten notes.

Rnote is an open-source vector-based drawing app for sketching, handwritten notes and to annotate documents and pictures.
Targeted at students, teachers and those who own a drawing tablet, it provides features like PDF and picture import and export,
an infinite canvas and an adaptive UI for big and small screens.

Written in Rust and GTK4.
this release changes:
- feat: apply workspace entry dialog by pressing Enter (@ternison)
- feat: add text formatting keyboard shortcuts (@ Keschler)
- feat: Xournal++ text import (@Doublonmousse)
- fix: PDF rendering issues by replace underlying library (from poppler to hayro) (@flxzt)
- feat: CLI create command (@DarshPareek)
- feat: CLI thumbnail generation timeout (@flxzt)
- feat: bundle CLI in flatpak (@flxzt)
- feat: atomic file saving (@anesthetice)
- improv: pen eraser default (@DorianRudolph)
- improv: improve initial focus for import/export dialogs (@Doublonmousse)
- fix: file picker stealing focus from all opened windows (@Doublonmousse)
- fix: pen sounds on Windows (@Doublonmousse)
- fix: prevent crash when sorting files with non UTF-8 names (@Doublonmousse)
- fix: rnote thumbnailer execution (@flxzt)
- fix: workspace directory default (@flxzt)
